name: vespiquen
flavor_text: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.

moves.name: slash
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: gust
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Pokémon in the air.

moves.name: poison-sting
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: sweet-scent
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: fury-cutter
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.

moves.name: aromatic-mist
moves.effect: Raises a selected ally’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: pursuit
moves.effect: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.

moves.name: pin-missile
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: fell-stinger
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.

moves.name: fury-swipes
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: silver-wind
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: aromatherapy
moves.effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.

moves.name: roost
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

moves.name: heal-order
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

moves.name: attack-order
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: defend-order
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: captivate
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages if it’s the opposite gender.

moves.name: destiny-bond
moves.effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.

moves.name: recover
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

moves.name: acrobatics
moves.effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

moves.name: aerial-ace
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: air-slash
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: assurance
moves.effect: Power is doubled if the target has already received damage this turn.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: beat-up
moves.effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.

moves.name: bug-bite
moves.effect: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.

moves.name: bug-buzz
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confuse-ray
moves.effect: Confuses the target.

moves.name: cross-poison
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit and a 10% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: cut
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: defog
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.  Removes field effects from the enemy field.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: dual-wingbeat
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: endeavor
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s HP to equal the user’s.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: flash
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hex
moves.effect: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hone-claws
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: hurricane
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: infestation
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: lunge
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: natural-gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the held berry.

moves.name: pollen-puff
moves.effect: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.

moves.name: power-gem
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: quash
moves.effect: Makes the target act last this turn.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: revenge
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the user takes damage before attacking this turn.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: scary-face
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: screech
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: skitter-smack
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: sludge-bomb
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: spikes
moves.effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: spite
moves.effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.

moves.name: struggle-bug
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: toxic-spikes
moves.effect: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.

moves.name: u-turn
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: venoshock
moves.effect: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.

moves.name: x-scissor
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: air-cutter
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: laser-focus
moves.effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.

moves.name: mud-slap
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: ominous-wind
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats by one stage.

moves.name: signal-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: string-shot
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: tailwind
moves.effect: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.

abilitiesDetailed.name: pressure
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.

abilitiesDetailed.name: unnerve
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
